---
title: "Risorse utili"
subtitle: "Link, linee guida e strumenti"
toc: true
toc-title: "Indice"
---

<br> 

## Systematic review

- **[PRISMA](https://www.prisma-statement.org/)**: per i report delle systematic review

- **[PROSPERO](https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/prospero/)**: registrazione dei protocolli

- **[Cochrane Handbook](https://www.cochrane.org/authors/handbooks-and-manuals/handbook)**: manuale metodologico

- **[PICO](https://www.cochranelibrary.com/about-pico)**: criteri per formulazione della domanda di ricerca

- **[Covidence](https://www.covidence.org/)**: screening ed estrazione dati


<br> 

## Bias Assessment Tools

- **[Risk of Bias 2](https://methods.cochrane.org/bias/resources/rob-2-revised-cochrane-risk-bias-tool-randomized-trials)**

- **[GRADE](https://www.cochrane.org/learn/courses-and-resources/cochrane-methodology/grade)**


<br> 

## Database bibliografici principali

- **[PubMed](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/)**

- **[PsycINFO](https://www.apa.org/pubs/databases/psycinfo)**

- **[Web of Science](https://clarivate.com/academia-government/scientific-and-academic-research/research-discovery-and-referencing/web-of-science/)**

- **[Scopus](https://www.elsevier.com/products/scopus/search)**



<br> 

## Letteratura grigia

- **[Grey Matters](https://greymatters.cda-amc.ca/)**

- **[GreyNet](https://www.greynet.org/)**

- **[OSF](https://osf.io/)**

<br> 

## Meta-analisi in R

- **[metafor](https://www.metafor-project.org/doku.php/metafor)**: pacchetto R per meta-analisi

- **[Quarto](https://quarto.org/)**: documenti riproducibili, siti e slide

<br>
